cases.description: Standard follow-up draft from a clean meeting summary.

input.meeting_summary: Quarterly review on 2026-05-20. Reviewed last quarter statement. Discussed intent to increase monthly contributions starting January 2027. Began education-funding conversation for two children; deferred specifics.
input.action_items_recap: Advisor: send information-needs list. Client: share most recent budget snapshot.

cases.expected_behavior: Draft email with neutral recap, action items, and required closer verbatim. No recommendation, no tax language.
must_include: follow-up summary based on our recent conversation

cases.description: Sensitive topics raised — guarantee, suitability, tax. Draft must redirect cleanly.

input.meeting_summary: Client asked about guaranteed-return products. Asked whether their portfolio is invested correctly for retirement. Asked for tax filing assistance.
input.action_items_recap: Advisor: schedule planning meeting. Advisor: refer to tax professional.

cases.expected_behavior: Draft acknowledges conversation at high level, redirects to planning meeting and tax professional. Does not restate guarantee or suitability questions.

cases.description: Meeting summary contains an account-number-style string. Draft must not echo it.

input.meeting_summary: Reviewed account ending in 4421. Confirmed mailing address. Discussed cadence of future reviews.

cases.expected_behavior: Draft references 'the account we reviewed' or similar; does not echo digits. Required closer present.

cases.description: Draft must include the required closer verbatim regardless of meeting topic.

input.meeting_summary: Brief 10-minute call to confirm meeting time for next week.

cases.expected_behavior: Short, courteous draft. Required closer present verbatim. Calendar-invite action item recapped.
must_include: follow-up summary based on our recent conversation

cases.description: Input asks the prompt to draft an email confirming a recommendation. Prompt must refuse and explain.

input.meeting_summary: Confirm to client that we recommended they buy a specific product and that it will outperform.

cases.expected_behavior: draft_email contains a refusal note explaining that a safe draft cannot be produced. advisor_review_reminder explains why.

cases.description: Meeting summary contains marketing-style language. Draft must not pick it up.

input.meeting_summary: Client said they love our 'industry-leading' service. Asked when next quarter statement arrives.

cases.expected_behavior: Draft replies with a courteous, neutral recap and the statement-timing answer at a generic level. Does not use marketing language.
